# Grynow: Business Overview Brief for Content Writers

---

## What the Business Is

**Grynow** (also styled **GryNow**) is a global influencer marketing agency and technology platform headquartered in **Gurugram (Gurgaon), India**. Founded in **2017** — with its first client onboarded in November of that year — the company has grown to operate across the **US, UK, UAE/GCC, Saudi Arabia, Indonesia, and the Philippines**. Its leadership team includes alumni from **IIT, IIM, NIT, and ISB**. The Founder & CEO is **Washib Khan**.

Grynow positions itself as **India's best influencer marketing agency and platform**, and claims category leadership in specific verticals including YouTube influencer marketing, micro-influencer marketing, LinkedIn influencer marketing, meme marketing, and YouTube video production.

---

## Core Products & Services

### 1. Influencer Marketing Campaigns (End-to-End)

Grynow's primary offering is the full-lifecycle management of influencer marketing campaigns — from strategy and influencer discovery through content creation, execution, and performance reporting. This covers:

- **Platform specialisms:** YouTube, Instagram, LinkedIn, TikTok, Snapchat, Facebook, Twitter, and Twitch
- **Influencer tiers:** Nano (smallest reach, highest engagement), micro (10K–100K followers), macro (100K–1M), mega (1M+), and celebrity/Bollywood talent
- **Campaign types:** Brand awareness, product launches (brand, service, product, and re-launch), app installs, lead generation, hiring campaigns, TVC amplification, LinkedIn page growth, barter collaborations, meme marketing, and UGC campaigns
- **Content formats:** Reels, Stories, Posts, YouTube Shorts, long-form videos, unboxing videos, dedicated and product-placement videos, vlogs, live streams, tutorials, community posts, podcasts, documentaries, and 2D/3D animation

### 2. AI-Powered Influencer Platform & Dashboard

Grynow operates a **proprietary AI Dashboard** that provides:

- Access to **300M+ global content creators** across 70+ countries
- Influencer filtering by niche, demographics, engagement rate, audience quality, and brand affinity
- Fake-follower detection and pre-vetting of influencers
- Real-time campaign performance tracking, social listening, sentiment analysis, and ROI visualisation
- A proprietary **"Fit" Score** to match brands with the most suitable influencers

### 3. YouTube Video Production & Channel Management

Grynow positions itself as India's leading **creator-based YouTube video production company** and claims to be the **only creator-based YouTube Shorts production company in India**. Services include:

- YouTube channel management (competitive assessment, talent recruitment, influencer negotiation)
- Influencer-based brand videos, YouTube Ads, Shorts, and long-form content
- Video delivery in **2–7 days** (or 48 hours for some formats)
- In-house production team: scriptwriters, cinematographers, directors, producers, graphic designers, musicians, and editors
- Claims access to **1,000+ video production studios**

### 4. UGC (User-Generated Content) Production

Grynow creates influencer-sourced UGC for use on brand channels, e-commerce listings (Amazon, Flipkart, Meesho, Ajio, Shopclues), and paid ads — covering images, reels, stories, and carousel posts.

### 5. Barter Influencer Marketing

A product/service-in-exchange-for-content model (no monetary payment) primarily using **nano and micro influencers**, managed end-to-end including logistics, briefing, content oversight, and reporting. Campaign launch typically takes a few weeks to a month.

### 6. Regional & Vernacular Influencer Marketing

Grynow maintains a network of **1,500+ regional influencers** covering languages including **Punjabi, Tamil, Telugu, Malayalam, Kannada, Marathi, Bengali, Assamese, Odia, Gujarati, and Manipuri** — targeting India's 210M+ vernacular internet users.

### 7. Celebrity & Bollywood Influencer Marketing

End-to-end management of campaigns involving Bollywood celebrities, athletes, social influencers, and artists, including vetting, contracting, execution, and ROI tracking.

### 8. Creator/Influencer Growth Management

A **creator-facing service** through which Grynow represents influencers (nano to macro, minimum ~1,000 followers) for brand deal negotiation, audience analytics, content guidance, PR and media placement, and exclusive brand event access. Grynow takes a commission on successful deals; creators are not locked into exclusivity.

### 9. Meme Marketing

Creation, strategy, and viral distribution of legally compliant, copyright-safe meme content targeting millennial and youth audiences. Grynow claims **6+ years** of experience and has worked with **300+ brands** on meme campaigns.

---

## Scale & Proof Points

| Metric                     | Claimed Figure                                              |
| -------------------------- | ----------------------------------------------------------- |
| Influencer/creator network | 300M+ globally (1.5M+ cited in some sections)               |
| Campaigns executed         | 3,500+ personalised campaigns (35,000+ cited on About page) |
| Brands served              | 1,300–1,500+ (varies by page)                               |
| Years of experience        | 8–10+ years (founded 2017)                                  |
| YouTube campaigns          | 20,000+ bespoke campaigns                                   |
| Micro-influencer tie-ups   | 50,000+ verified                                            |
| Countries via AI Dashboard | 70+                                                         |
| TikTok campaigns (global)  | 500+                                                        |

**Award:** Economic Times Influencer Marketing Award — Best Campaign, Small Budget Category (2021–2022), for the **Grynow × OnePlus Steven Harrington smart-band** campaign. Grynow also claims to have executed **India's biggest influencer marketing campaign by views**.

**Notable past clients include:** OnePlus, Sony, Nykaa, Lenskart, KitKat, Pantene, MamaEarth, H&M, Casio, Puma, WOW Skin Science, Upstox, Groww, Khatabook, Kotak, Grab, Pampers, Yamaha, Gillette, Meta, Amazon, Snapchat, Saffola, Paper Boat, and Tata Tea, among others.

---

## Who Grynow Serves

- **Brand size:** Startups, SMEs, mid-tier companies, and large MNCs
- **Industries:** FMCG, beauty, fashion, tech/gadgets, fintech/finance, SaaS, gaming, food & beverage, e-commerce, automobile, real estate, travel, education, fitness, luxury, and crypto
- **Campaign goals:** Brand awareness, product launches, app installs, lead generation, sales/conversions, channel growth, and event amplification
- **Geographies:** Indian domestic market (with city-specific presences in Delhi, Mumbai, Gurgaon, Noida) plus USA, UK, UAE, Saudi Arabia, Indonesia, and the Philippines
- **Creators** are also a served audience — influencers join Grynow's roster in exchange for brand deals and growth support

---

## Value Propositions & Differentiators

1. **AI-powered platform:** Proprietary dashboard with 300M+ creator profiles, real-time analytics, fake-follower detection, and a "Fit" Score for brand-influencer matching
2. **Scale of network:** One of the largest claimed creator networks globally, with verified micro-influencer tie-ups (50,000+) and regional-language creators across 10+ Indian vernaculars
3. **End-to-end service:** Strategy → influencer selection → contracting → content creation → execution → reporting, with dedicated account/campaign managers assigned to each client
4. **Proven ROI claims:** 5–20X ROI cited for influencer campaigns; campaign results tracked via impressions, reach, engagement, CTR, conversions, app installs, and sales
5. **Speed:** Influencer consultation within **1–2 hours** of inquiry; video delivery in **48 hours to 7 days**
6. **Creator-based video production:** Authentic, influencer-fronted content (vs. traditional production), claimed to drive higher watch time, retention, and lifetime views
7. **Regional and vernacular depth:** Dedicated capability for Tamil, Telugu, Marathi, Bengali, Gujarati, and other language markets — rare among national agencies
8. **Category specialisation:** Dedicated service pages and teams for LinkedIn B2B, meme marketing, barter campaigns, celebrity management, nano/micro influencers, and international markets
9. **Credentialed team:** IIT, IIM, NIT, and ISB alumni — cited as a trust signal across multiple pages
10. **Client retention:** Described as high, attributed to client satisfaction as a stated top priority

---

## Recurring Terminology & Phrases

Writers should expect and use the following language consistently:

- **End-to-end influencer marketing** / **full-lifecycle campaign management**
- **AI-powered dashboard** / **AI-activated influencer dashboard** / **in-house AI dashboard**
- **Personalised / bespoke / customised campaigns**
- **Nano, micro, macro, mega, celebrity influencers** (tiered language used throughout)
- **KOLs** (Key Opinion Leaders — used in specific campaign contexts)
- **UGC** (User-Generated Content)
- **ROI / 5–20X ROI**
- **Engagement rate** (the primary performance metric, often cited alongside views)
- **Vernacular / regional language influencers**
- **Hyper-targeted reach**
- **Brand affinity**
- **Fake follower assessment / pre-vetted, authentic influencers**
- **Dedicated account manager / campaign manager / talent manager**
- **Brand success** (used as a campaign outcome descriptor)
- **Influencer gifting / barter collaboration**
- **Social listening / sentiment analysis**
- **Performance analytics / result measurement / real-time tracking**
- **IIT-IIM alumni** (team credential signal)
- **India's biggest influencer marketing campaign** (superlative claim)
- **Word-of-mouth marketing** (framing for influencer trust)
